title: BackgroundJob
description: Defines a background job that is triggered on insertion of new record in background_jobs table.

id.description: Unique identifier for the job. This field is auto-incremented.

methodName.description: JobHandler name of the method that will be executed for this job.

runAt.description: Timestamp when the job was run in Unix epoch time milliseconds (default: as soon as possible).

progress.description: Number of work units completed by the job.

total.description: Total number of work units expected for the job.

result.description: Serialized result summary for the job.

error.description: Error message for a failed job.

cancelRequested.description: Whether cancellation has been requested for the job.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the job reached a terminal state in Unix epoch time milliseconds.

createdBy.description: User or Bot who triggered the background job.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was created in Unix epoch time milliseconds.

updatedAt.description: Time when job was last updated in Unix epoch time milliseconds.
